    • enableSuperimpose

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus enableSuperimpose()
      Enable automatic display of superimpose track when data appears. Automatic display is enabled by default.
      Returns:
      A4TVStatus status of operation

    • disableSuperimpose

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus disableSuperimpose()
      Disable automatic display of superimpose track when data appears. Automatic display is enabled by default.
      Returns:
      A4TVStatus status of operation

    • isEnabledSuperimpose

      public boolean isEnabledSuperimpose()
      Check is enabled automatic display of superimpose track. Automatic display is enabled by default.
      Returns:
      true if enabled, false if disabled.

    • registerListener

      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus registerListener(SubtitleListener listener)

    • unregisterListener

      public void unregisterListener(SubtitleListener listener)
